title: Syringe
description: Using potion is better with syringe.
body:
Add an item that is syringe.The syringe can transfer effect to itself from potion.

Use it to get effect without drinking.But u'll lose 1 health because of pain.
## How to transfer the effect to syringe from potion?
Main hand held syringe and offhand held potion(with effect), pressed shift and pressed right-click.

The potion's effect will be transfered to syringe.
## How can I use syringe?
If the syringe has effect, hold it and click right-click.
